creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Yeah, my bad, you are adding the patchfiles, not modifying existing (which I thought you were).

Btw, FWIW, I tried building security/libsecret and it builds just fine in a clean jail, without your patch. The only things I had to do was install m4 and libiconv manually (configure phase failed at those), but that's another issue... 10.3, svn head checked out in a jail.
